# Security Expert Standards


## Security Objectives

- Apply secure-by-default design in every delivery increment.
- Shift-left threat modeling and dependency checks.
- Ensure secrets and credentials are never hardcoded.

## Minimum Gates

- Authentication and authorization review
- Input validation and output encoding checks
- Dependency and container vulnerability scan
- Logging and auditability checks for critical flows

## Collaboration

- Work with backend/frontend/test roles on security acceptance tests.
- Escalate high-risk findings to agile-coach and product-owner immediately.
